characters.appearance: Male, mid-20s to early 30s, medium build, olive complexion. Dark hair and a mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a red graphic.
characters.demeanor: Focused, initially frustrated, then happy and confident.

characters.appearance: Female, mid-20s to early 30s, medium build, fair complexion. Brown hair tied back.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Weather. [Weather.]
App voice says: Let's practice that again. मेरे साथ बोलिए। [Let's practice that again. Speak with me.]
Character B says: Weather. [Weather.]
App voice says: Now try this sentence. [Now try this sentence.]
Character A says: He put on his father's old clothes. [He put on his father's old clothes.]
Character A says: यार, ये 'TH' sound बहुत मुश्किल है। [Man, this 'TH' sound is very difficult.]
Character B says: He put on his father's old clothes. [He put on his father's old clothes.]
Character A says: Healthy. [Healthy.]
App voice says: Let's compare. क्या आपको difference समझ आया? [Let's compare. Did you understand the difference?]
Character B says: Healthy. [Healthy.]
App voice says: Awesome! बिल्कुल सही! [Awesome! Absolutely correct!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the learner struggling with English pronunciation.
- Introduces the AI app as a patient, interactive tutor that provides immediate feedback.
- Shows a supportive learning environment with a friend, highlighting progress.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova App
AI Tutor
Let's practice that again.
76%
weather
Listening...
Now try this sentence.
He put on his father's old clothes.
84%
Compare your pronunciation.
healthy
79%
Awesome! बिल्कुल सही!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मुझे English words pronounce करने में बहुत hesitation होती थी, पर Supernova app के साथ रोज़ practice करने से मेरा confidence काफी बढ़ गया है। [I used to hesitate a lot in pronouncing English words, but practicing daily with the Supernova app has really boosted my confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Direct-to-camera testimonial breaking the fourth wall.
- Shifts the emotional beat from struggle to confidence.
- Explicitly names the app and its primary benefit (building confidence through daily practice).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
thumb 69%
thunder 81%
something 91%
thyroid 79%
thorn 84%
thesis 91%
Supernova AI Feedback
Awesome!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Than. [Than.]
App voice says: Great job! ऐसे ही practice करते रहें! [Great job! Keep practicing like this!]
Character B says: Nice! एकदम सही! [Nice! Absolutely correct!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff: the learner successfully pronounces a difficult word.
- Reinforces the positive, encouraging tone of both the app and the friend.
- Visually rewards the user with high scores.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova App
AI Tutor
Now, let's try the next word.
than
Listening...
94%
Great job! ऐसे ही practice करते रहें!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो अगर आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना सीखना चाहते हैं, तो आज ही Supernova app डाउनलोड करें। [So if you also want to learn to speak English without fear, download the Supernova app today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Strong, direct call to action.
- Focuses on the emotional goal: speaking without fear.
- Prompts immediate app download without making specific pricing promises.
